subcategory: product showcase card with 3D bounce animation
use_cases: Displaying product images with eye-catching floating animation on e-commerce sites
Showcasing featured products with subtle 3D effects on landing pages
Creating animated product catalogs with continuous motion effects
Adding visual interest to product grids with bouncing card elements
Highlighting premium products with depth and shadow effects
ai_summary: A lightweight product card component featuring continuous 3D bounce animation using Framer Motion. The component displays a product image that floats up and down with subtle rotateY transformation, paired with a realistic bottom shadow for depth. Designed for product showcases, e-commerce displays, and landing pages where visual attention is key.
